subcodes.first_line: O daughter of Mine aunt! The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness to the love, devotion and attraction of that leaf. God willing, by the fire of the Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بنت عمه شهادت میدهد قلم اعلی بمحبت و توجه و اقبال آن ورقه انشاء الله بنار کلمه
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement
